div.p: Per-topic subscriber management with isolated delivery channels
One TopicState per topic. Independent locking allows concurrent operations on different topics.
DeliveryBufferSize = 100 Prevents slow subscribers from blocking fast subscribers (head-of-line blocking prevention)

ul.li: S per subscriber (delivery loop) Example: 100 clients × 3 topics = ~600 goroutines Each Subscribe() spawns a deliveryLoop() that serializes writes to that subscriber.

ol.li: Ordering: All subscribers receive messages for a topic in publication order
Isolation: Slow subscriber cannot block delivery to other subscribers
Atomicity: Subscribe/Unsubscribe are atomic wrt concurrent Publish calls
No blocking: Publish never blocks on network I/O (channel buffer absorbs burst)

div.p: Acquire in order to prevent deadlock:
